name: Spam Stew with Buttermilk Topping
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream of chicken soup (10 3/4 oz)
1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cubed (12 oz)
1 package Frozen cut broccoli, cooked and drained (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a large saucepan, combine the cream of chicken soup and milk.
3. Add chopped onion and cook until onion is translucent.
4. Stir in cubed cream cheese and continue cooking until melted.
5. Add shredded carrot, chopped celery, grated Parmesan cheese, and cubed SPAM.
6. Cook and stir until all ingredients are well combined.
7. Stir in the cooked and drained frozen broccoli.
8. Mix the pancake mix with Cheddar cheese.
9. In a separate bowl, combine milk, beaten egg, and oil with the pancake mixture; stir until smooth.
10. Pour the topping over the SPAM mixture in the casserole dish.
11. Sprinkle sliced almonds on top.
12. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
